tasks.title: Local technical slice
acceptance: C# solution builds without warnings or errors
8 xUnit tests pass
Python pytest suite passes
Godot headless smoke completes and writes a save
tasks.notes: Not complete until the same code has run in required remote CI.

tasks.title: Strict bootstrap and verification front door
acceptance: A documented doctor command validates exact required tool versions
The required verification command fails when Godot is unavailable
Linux and Windows CI execute all required M0 checks
Failure logs and machine-readable test results are uploaded

tasks.title: Correct deterministic geodata record emission
acceptance: Edge IDs remain paired with their source IDs and geometries after sorting
Reversed input feature order produces equivalent semantic output
Topology uses a multigraph and preserves legitimate parallel directed edges
Endpoint topology and emitted geometry cannot create seam gaps
verification: uv run --project tools/map_pipeline ruff check tools/map_pipeline

tasks.title: Locked public-domain source acquisition and elevation
acceptance: Manifest source IDs, publishers, URLs, and licenses are enforced against the catalog
NHPN acquisition paginates in stable order, resumes, retries, deduplicates, and reconciles expected counts
3DEP acquisition locks an explicit product and exact artifacts for a route corridor
Rebuilds from the acquisition lockfile perform no discovery and fail on hash drift
Elevation, grade, CRS, and horizontal and vertical datums survive into packaged content
verification: uv run --project tools/map_pipeline cannonball-map validate-lock data/sources/source-lock.json

tasks.title: Sharded route packaging and runtime streaming
acceptance: The root route index is under 64 MB
Each runtime chunk is under 16 MB and independently hashed
Missing and corrupt chunks are rejected before use
The game streams packaged chunks instead of the procedural RoadMath corridor
A committed official-source fixture passes pipeline-to-C#-to-Godot integration

tasks.title: Exact save, resume, and recovery
acceptance: Runtime load reconstructs authoritative route, origin, vehicle, elapsed time, systems, and stream state
The checksum covers the actual route package
Thousands of seeded save points reload to equivalent authoritative state
Interrupted, corrupt, and previous-version saves recover or fail with an actionable result

tasks.title: Deterministic long-route scenario runner
acceptance: Scenario inputs include route package, seed, assist profile, target distance, save points, and expected completion
Evidence reports seams, route transitions, rebases, maximum local coordinate, frame-time and chunk-build percentiles, memory growth, collision misses, and resume equivalence
A 500-mile Linux and Windows traversal has zero missing chunks, hash failures, road gaps, and save divergence
All three assist profiles have deterministic regression scenarios

tasks.title: Reproducible unsigned desktop exports
acceptance: CI installs exact Godot 4.7.1 export templates
Linux and Windows packages are produced from checked-in presets
Each package passes a clean-machine launch smoke
Each package has checksums, tool versions, source revision, content hashes, and an SBOM
Artifact promotion is immutable and rollback is documented

tasks.title: Remote authority and protected integration
acceptance: The implementation is committed and required workflows pass remotely
Main requires the declared CI checks
Delivery tasks have dependency and evidence records
Concurrent tasks declare generated-output ownership before work begins

tasks.title: Visual and collision streaming separation
acceptance: Only the declared near-player window carries collision
Visual lookahead remains available through the declared time-to-arrival horizon
Chunk work respects the measured frame-time and build-latency budgets

tasks.title: Modern PlayGodot semantic UI automation spike
acceptance: The bridge runs on unmodified official Godot 4.7.1 on macOS, Linux, and Windows
Interactive Control nodes expose unique stable automation IDs and normalized semantic state
The protocol supports bounded tree inspection, signal waits, input, and node or viewport screenshots
Transport binds only to loopback on an ephemeral port and requires a per-run token and version handshake
Mutation and method calls are absent by default or constrained by explicit capability allowlists
Malformed, oversized, unauthenticated, timed-out, and disallowed requests fail closed with transcripts
Release packages prove that no enabled PlayGodot server or rendezvous surface is present
The spike measures unique defect coverage, flake rate, execution time, and diagnosis cost against CLI plus Computer Use

tasks.title: Deterministic asset and provenance pipeline
acceptance: Blender and export tooling are pinned
Headless exports enforce naming, scale, import profiles, LOD, collision, and budget rules
Every source asset and audio file has license and provenance metadata
Visual regression artifacts are produced for representative scenes

human_gate.name: Art direction and final rights approval

tasks.title: Signed public release promotion
acceptance: Signed or notarized packages pass clean-machine installation and launch
Release checksums, SBOM, provenance, migration evidence, and rollback artifacts are published
Production credentials are isolated in an approval-gated environment

human_gate.name: Signing credentials, store submission, and public release approval

tasks.notes: Blocked until a release channel is decided and credentials are provisioned by a human.
